title: sabal serrulata
intro: Sabal serrulata, also known as the saw palmetto, is a small palm tree native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that may help to soothe and protect the urinary tract and prostate gland. The health benefits of saw palmetto include reducing symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), such as enlarged prostate and urinary frequency, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of andropause and other hormonal imbalances. Saw palmetto is commonly prepared as a dietary supplement in capsule or softgel form, although it can also be consumed as a tea, tincture, or extract.
